catalogDescription: Turn a rough founder offer into a structured outreach campaign with strategy notes, emails, LinkedIn messages, objections, exports, and local saves.
title: Founder Outreach Kit
subtitle: Shape the strategy, generate the sequence, and keep the campaign on your machine.
descriptionBody:
Most founder outreach fails before the first message is sent. The offer is vague, the proof is buried, the CTA is weak, and the sequence sounds like a generic template.

Founder Outreach Kit turns a rough founder offer into a structured campaign with strategist notes, copy-ready email and LinkedIn messages, objection handling, and export-ready output. It is built for founders who need sharper outbound without handing their working draft to a bloated CRM first.
section1Title: A practical outbound workspace for founder-led selling
section1Body: Move from offer clarity to channel-ready copy in one guided flow. Define the customer, pain, proof, CTA, tone, and objections, then generate a campaign you can review, save locally, and reuse. The output stays grounded in strategy before it becomes messaging.

features.name: Strategy First, Copy Second
features.desc: Before generating a single email, you audit your offer and positioning. Wrong strategy produces wrong copy — this tool makes you do the strategy first.

features.name: The Email Sequence Generator
features.desc: Structured cold outreach sequences with opening hooks, value frames, objection handles, and clear CTAs — adapted for founder-to-founder context.

features.name: The LinkedIn Message Flow
features.desc: Short, high-signal LinkedIn outreach flows designed for founders reaching out to other founders, investors, or early customers.

features.name: Objection Library
features.desc: Pre-built objection handling for the most common founder outreach responses — so you are never caught off guard.

features.name: Local Draft Saves
features.desc: Everything exports and saves locally. Your drafts, your data, your workflow — no cloud dependency, no account needed.

whyTitle: Why use this instead of drafting from scratch?

whyPoints.title: Strategy Before Copy
whyPoints.desc: Most outreach fails because the offer is vague, not because the email is badly written. This tool forces you to sharpen the offer first.

whyPoints.title: Built for Founder Motion
whyPoints.desc: Designed for early-stage founder-led sales — not growth team playbooks. Every message is written to sound like a founder, not a template.

whyPoints.title: Your Drafts Stay Yours
whyPoints.desc: No cloud, no account required. Export your sequence, edit in your own editor, and run the campaign from your own inbox.

footerSummaryDetails: (Free beta with open access while we validate the workflow and tighten the output quality).
footerResultDetails: A structured outbound campaign with strategist notes, sendable messages, objection replies, exports, and local saves.
whatYouGet: Local campaign saves on your device
whoThisIsFor: Founders shaping outbound before hiring a growth team
Early-stage teams testing founder-led sales messages
Operators who need campaign structure without a heavy CRM workflow
Builders refining outbound copy from live market feedback

faq.q: Is this free to use right now?
faq.a: Yes. The current beta is open access and free while we validate the workflow.
Yes. Campaigns can be saved locally on your device so you can return to working drafts.

faq.q: What kind of output does it generate?
faq.a: You get strategy guidance, email copy, LinkedIn messages, objection replies, and export-ready campaign output.
